Line Status

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x14
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Read-only register reflecting the status of the receiver and transmitter.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] reserved rw 0x0 -
[7] rfe r 0x0 RFE
[6] temt r 0x1 TEMT
[5] thre r 0x1 THRE
[4] bi r 0x0 BI
[3] fe r 0x0 FE
[2] pe r 0x0 PE
[1] oe r 0x0 OE
[0] dr r 0x0 DR

Field Descriptions

rfe - RFE

Receiver FIFO Error. At least one parity/framing error or break in RX FIFO.

temt - TEMT

Transmitter Empty. Both the transmit FIFO/THR and the shift register are empty.

thre - THRE

Transmit Holding Register Empty. THR or TX FIFO is empty; data can be written.

bi - BI

Break Interrupt. Serial input held low longer than one character time.

fe - FE

Framing Error. No valid STOP bit detected in received data.

pe - PE

Parity Error. Parity mismatch detected in received character (when PEN=1).

oe - OE

Overrun Error. New data arrived before previous data was read.

dr - DR

Data Ready. RBR or RX FIFO contains at least one character.
